vocab.meaning: lưu giữ khoảnh khắc vĩnh cửu
vocab.example: I love photography because it allows me to immortalize a moment that would otherwise fade from memory.
Ever since I got my first DSLR, I’ve become quite the shutterbug, taking my camera everywhere I go.

vocab.meaning: bức ảnh chụp tự nhiên (không diễn)
vocab.example: I prefer taking a candid shot over a posed one because it captures genuine emotions.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ, sức hút nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I’m often drawn to architecture with strong aesthetic appeal when I'm out scouting for locations.

vocab.meaning: khả năng khơi gợi (cảm xúc, kỷ niệm)
vocab.example: A well-composed photograph has an incredible evocative power that can transport you back in time.
Photography is all about seizing a fleeting instant before the light or the expression changes.
For me, taking photos is a form of visual storytelling where every frame narrates a different part of the journey.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: I spend hours on post-processing to ensure the colors and contrast perfectly match my artistic vision.

vocab.meaning: độ sâu trường ảnh (hiệu ứng xóa phông)
vocab.example: Using a shallow depth of field helps me isolate the subject and create a beautiful bokeh effect.

vocab.meaning: con mắt tinh tường, chú ý đến chi tiết
vocab.example: Photography has helped me develop a keen eye for detail, noticing textures and patterns I used to overlook.
